mapper.select: SELECT worship_id, title, preacher, scripture, worship_date, worship_type, video_url, description, status, reg_date FROM erp_worship WHERE video_url IS NOT NULL AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND (title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR preacher LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%') ORDER BY worship_date DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_worship WHERE video_url IS NOT NULL AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND (title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR preacher LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
